claims.text: Pass 0029 defines ActionReceiptResearchClaimProposal/v1 with event_type=research_claim_packet_created, public source digest sha256:fcc8d3d9dea488bfd4dee9bbc9898cde12472df26ecbcc3665aaaae9d045bf62, prior binding digest sha256:75aeda5b9afa02eb1da746aa319d2908a7895f26aefe5d1949d1d949ff3c0f32, raw_source_material_required=false, raw_browser_payload_required=false, model_reasoning_required_for_replay=false, and verification verdict MATCH.

claims.falsification: the claim set has different IDs, fewer or more than three verified claims, fewer or more than two UNVERIFIABLE claims, or promotes proof correctness/future currentness
claims.text: Pass 0029 claim set contains exactly five claims: three source-verified pipeline-math README positioning/process/formalization claims and two BLOCKED UNVERIFIABLE claims for mathematical proof correctness and future repository currentness.

claims.falsification: negative fixtures are missing, fewer than ten, have different IDs, or any negative fixture is not marked expected_validator_status REJECT
claims.text: Pass 0029 defines ten negative fixtures covering proof-correctness promotion, future-currentness promotion, broad-science generalization, missing source URL, source SHA drift, pass 0028 binding drift, network/console UNVERIFIABLE promotion, missing action receipt proposal, and missing verifier measurement; every negative fixture expects validator status REJECT.
